report.summary: Refactored whale-watch page (fixed broken CSS vars + metadata), improved courses mobile layout, added loading skeletons, created OG image for whale-watch.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: whale-watch: Split into server page + client component — metadata now works correctly (was silently ignored in 'use client' file)
whale-watch: Replaced all broken CSS variables (var(--bg), var(--text), etc.) with correct design system tokens (var(--color-bg), var(--glass-bg), etc.)
whale-watch: Added glass-morphism styling to match site design language (backdrop blur, glass borders, rounded corners)
whale-watch: Added loading skeleton with shimmer animation for initial data load
whale-watch: Added proper Breadcrumb navigation (was missing entirely)
whale-watch: Fixed stat cards grid from md:grid-cols-2 to grid-cols-2 for better mobile layout (2-up on small screens)
whale-watch: Added ARIA labels to filters (htmlFor + id), transaction type icons, live badge, progress bars, and feed region
whale-watch: Wrapped filters in semantic fieldset/legend for screen readers
whale-watch: Added proper TypeScript interfaces (WhaleTx, TopWhale, AccumulationZone) replacing 'any' types
courses/[slug]: Fixed grid-cols-4 → grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 for responsive stats row
courses/[slug]: Increased minimum font size from 10px to 11px for accessibility compliance
courses/[slug]: Added aria-label='Breadcrumb' to nav element and aria-current='page' to active breadcrumb item
courses/[slug]: Added OG image + Twitter card metadata (was missing)
badges: Changed hardcoded background #0d1117 to var(--color-bg) for theme consistency
badges/loading: Updated skeleton to use design system CSS variables instead of hardcoded rgba values
courses: Added loading.tsx skeleton with shimmer animation for course hub

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: whale-watch (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with live badge, stat cards, chart line, brand gradient
Verified existing OG images: badges (1200x630), courses (1200x630) already present

sections.title: Accessibility Fixes
items: Added aria-hidden='true' to all decorative Lucide icons across whale-watch
Added aria-label to transaction type icons (Buy/Sell/Transfer)
Added role='status' to LIVE badge
Added role='region' aria-label to transaction feed
Added role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow/min/max to accumulation bars
Added focus ring styles (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#6366f1]) to all form inputs
